DP.077.0000:
Oh, is that a Pokédex?
You must be helping Professor Rowan?\f
What’s your name?\f
...\f
OK, hello, [0103,0000].
I’ll be sure to remember that name!\f
My name is Cynthia.
I’m a Trainer just like you.\f
I’ve been studying Pokémon mythology
lately, just out of curiosity.\f
DP.077.0001:
Here in Eterna City, there is a
statue of an ancient Pokémon.\f
According to myth, it was an
extremely powerful Pokémon.\f
Who knows? You may encounter
something like it while you’re\r
traveling with your Pokédex.\f
Try using this.
It should help you on your way.\f
DP.077.0002:
Cynthia: Remember, the hidden move
Cut can be used in the field.\f
It will let you go places that were
previously inaccessible to you.\f
That’s important for filling up your
Pokédex, right?\f
Then luck be with you, young Trainer!\f
DP.077.0003:
Hey! You there, kid!
Stay away from that Pokémon statue!\f
Team Galactic is conducting an
official investigation here!
DP.077.0004:
Hey, you! Yeah, you, Trainer!\f
Errr...
It’s OK. Never mind. You look tough.\f
I won’t take... Um, I’ll just let you
keep your Pokémon. Carry on!
DP.077.0005:
Have you seen our building?\f
Team Galactic is so stinking rich
that we can have one built instantly!
DP.077.0006:
Since that Team Galactic building went
up, the city’s atmosphere has gotten\r
all creepy and tense.\f
I don’t know what those people are
doing up in that place...
DP.077.0007:
With Team Galactic gone, what’s going
to happen to their building?
DP.077.0008:
My friend said Team Galactic took his
favorite Pokémon away.\f
I don’t think he’s telling the truth.
Team Galactic looks so cool.\r
They don’t look like common thugs.
DP.077.0009:
Do you use Bike stands?\f
It looks so cool to hop off your Bike
and then lean on it. It looks so smooth!
DP.077.0010:
If you’re visiting Eterna, you need to
get yourself a Bicycle and take a\r
ride down the Cycling Road.
DP.077.0012:
They say this is an old city.\f
It doesn’t look it, though.
Not with all these tall buildings.
DP.077.0013:
Eterna City’s not anything like it
was before, way back in the day.
DP.077.0014:
They say this is a Pokémon that lived
long, long ago.
DP.077.0015:
Oh, don’t tell me you don’t have
an Explorer Kit?\f
You should have a word with the man
next door to the Pokémon Center.\f
DP.077.0016:
Oh, don’t tell me you don’t have
an Explorer Kit?\f
You should have a word with the man
next door to the Pokémon Center.
DP.077.0017:
Going underground with the Explorer
Kit is a blast, isn’t it?
DP.077.0018:
Oh, wow!
You got a Bicycle!\f
You can ride down Cycling Road
and end up in Hearthome City.\f
It’s a fast and fun ride.
You should check it out!\f
DP.077.0019:
Oh, wow!
You got a Bicycle!\f
You can ride down Cycling Road
and end up in Hearthome City.\f
It’s a fast and fun ride.
You should check it out!
DP.077.0020:
It feels great riding a Bike with the
wind in your face, doesn’t it?
DP.077.0022:
Eterna City Pokémon Gym
Leader: Gardenia\r
Master of Vivid Plant Pokémon!
DP.077.0023:
Rad Rickshaw’s Cycle Shop
Get On and Ride!
DP.077.0024:
Team Galactic Eterna Building
We Want Your Pokémon!
DP.077.0025:
Underground Man’s House
Goin’ Down for Adventure!
DP.077.0027:
There is some writing on the
Pokémon statue...\f
...creation of DIA...
...giver of time...\f
In laughter, there is tears...
And, likewise...\f
The same time flows...
...the blessing of DIA...\f
The text is barely legible and
has faded completely in places...
DP.077.0028:
There is some writing on the
Pokémon statue...\f
...birth of PAL...
...creator of parallel dimensions...\f
Alive, yet not alive...
...rifts in space...\f
To arrive in the same univer...
...the blessing of PAL...\f
The text is barely legible and
has faded completely in places...
